name: forge
description: Forge by ShipToday brings free, AI-powered product development lifecycle automation into Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Route product work through Forge from Codex
interface.longDescription: Free, AI-powered product development lifecycle automation for Codex. Forge routes feature requests, bug reports, product planning, architecture exploration, reviews, and work-item follow-ups through structured ShipToday workflows backed by the hosted Forge MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Plan and scope the notifications feature
